{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204093324750B303C567E6597A8"}"},"total":819},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6858638781751492619","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书不错，中虐猪，猪脚性格分明，理性而不冷酷，智商基本在线又偶尔模糊。有后宫但不会因为看到是个女人就走不动路。遵循自然法则又有自己的原则，猪脚强无敌而又不无敌，标准的废材重生，但又有严谨的机遇。世界观大体严谨完整。在俺个人看来，是个难得的优质书。。。好吧，再提一嘴，本来可以给五分的，但是虐猪方面给你扣一分，或者说，扣你一分家庭分"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1596901285,"group_id":"6522439127646866445","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"纵有生死离别，不如留书一卷。供世人览阅处，写存在之一笔！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4Z2Vm6+Uw4axfd/x46nkwykgkb1lJUvaG3U75HbDkGZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/b7e6c4e4498d4339812b531f8744e16e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707258&x-signature=qeMpvfyp28IZsVHN9VihCdly028%3D","user_id":"3861094319812071","user_name":"狼浃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3861094319812071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1645344357,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FF 在末世中挣扎了三年的孔哲重生到了三年前末世发生的那一天。

小说的智斗成分很多，不像一般小说无脑打人，当然我还只看了前期。质量好，但爽文的爽度不高。re:0和这本小说真的很像，都经历了绝望，哪怕主角穿越了都是如此。
至于为什么有看动漫的感觉，可能就是因为他不是单纯的打打杀杀吧，别人越级开挂，主角越级可以说是“取巧”致胜，能力很变态，关键他用的也让人耳目一新。设定上作者也用了一些心，神器的能力不烂大街，文笔很好就是了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1595008961,"group_id":"6522439127646866445","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwYdKK6GeF6qWpP9o6UdrQWWV4STJlfK4gVpg7TCSO/l","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/e504fe4f599a4119b1f743e154823da3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709286&x-signature=7HsYBsSVs9ESkcvwidLJ6EsYEsk%3D","user_id":"2176634387171048","user_name":"jo级番茄🍅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2176634387171048","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6522439127646866445","book_info":{"abstract":"末世降临，无数魔兽和异世界种族涌入，地球被游戏化，人类沦为最底层的猎物。
